input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Mount Sinai Hospital. There are 19 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "gi", "count": 3, "message": "3 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "general", "count": 8, "message": "8 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 7, "message": "7 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 214, "current_utilization": 32, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto General Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-general", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto General Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto Western Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-western", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto Western Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Mount Sinai Hospital has 19 incoming patients. Activate infection control for the GI cluster and consider isolation for the respiratory cluster. Capacity is stable for the next two hours, but be prepared to divert CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, Toronto General, or Toronto Western as needed.
